title: MF investor panic subsides even as markets dipped in March 2026
description: SIP contributions had decreased 3.73% to ₹29,845 crore in February 2026 and had stagnated at ₹31,002 crore in January 2026 and December 2025, reflecting investor panics with the many headwinds including dropping returns due to FII exodus, rupee depreciation, AI scares and recently the Iran war.
